translation: self.assertFalse(records.isEmpty(), "Records list should not be empty")
self.assertEqual("a", records.get(0).values()[0], "First value of first record should be 'a'")
self.assertEqual("b", records.get(0).values()[1], "Second value of first record should be 'b'")
self.assertEqual("c", records.get(0).values()[2], "Third value of first record should be 'c'")
self.assertEqual("1", records.get(1).values()[0], "First value of second record should be '1'")
self.assertEqual("2", records.get(1).values()[1], "Second value of second record should be '2'")
self.assertEqual("3", records.get(1).values()[2], "Third value of second record should be '3'")
self.assertEqual("x", records.get(2).values()[0], "First value of third record should be 'x'")
self.assertEqual("y", records.get(2).values()[1], "Second value of third record should be 'y'")
self.assertEqual("z", records.get(2).values()[2], "Third value of third record should be 'z'")
